body:

Dear Peter,

President Donald Trump said he
will select a new nominee for the Supreme Court on Friday and
announce it next week.

Join me tonight when my guest,

longstanding laws, including the battles we face for religious
freedom.

Brad is a religious freedom and
civil rights attorney and hosts a weekly radio program, The Dacus
Report, which can be heard on radio stations across the country.

Be part of the conversation where
faith and politics intersect!

body:

Our government shouldn't be in the business of picking winners and losers.
But that's exactly what it does with **[three narrow tax perks that benefit a select few](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=56a497b9477855aae23171be87ed477730fc429a2784520cc77d008ee467850d "three narrow tax perks that benefit a select few"),** costing the state tens of millions of dollars a year while burdening the rest of us.
Luckily, there is a new bill in our State Senate that would put a cap on these tax credits and phase them out over the next ten years, leveling the playing field for everyone.
[](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=670ed40b2cbebf70455ee9935cfb024be7c498cfbb6a6692cd6f33b57d25a96d)
With your help, we can make sure our elected officials know this would be a huge step toward making the system fairer for everyone.
In Liberty,

Tyler FooteVirginia State Director

name: Larry Berman
subject: I was lucky
body:
My cancer diagnosis could have been a death sentence **Read why the Affordable Care Act matters to Larry, and then say you're in to defend it:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Save-the-ACA1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170126_sup_nd&source=em_20170126_sup_nd")**
Hi --

I was a healthy person. I ate right and exercised daily. But none of that mattered when, at the age of 55, I was diagnosed with stage four diffuse large B-cell lymphoma. In 30% of patients who have this type of cancer where it presented in me, the cancer spreads to the brain and the survival rate is low. Although this type of cancer grows and spreads fast, it is often responsive to chemotherapy.

Luckily, I was able to get the best cancer treatment in the world at Memorial Sloane Kettering Hospital in Manhattan thanks to the insurance my employer -- a small-business owner employing 10 people -- was able to obtain through the health insurance marketplace.

My boss was able to provide quality health insurance for all of us, myself included, for a price that didn't bankrupt his business. Because the Affordable Care Act no longer allows insurance companies to deny coverage for people with a pre-existing condition, he is also able to shop for competitive rates for all of us -- and I don't have to worry about losing coverage.

The moment I was diagnosed with cancer, I knew my life had changed forever. A cancer diagnosis could have been a death sentence if it weren't for the health insurance I got through my job. I could focus on the fight of my life instead of fighting to pay enormous health care costs or worrying about losing my job or costing others theirs because my treatment would cost my employer too much money.

Republicans want to play partisan politics, but there will be life or death consequences for hardworking Americans like you, me, and my boss if we lose the protections of the Affordable Care Act.

I recently went for my two-year scan, and the results are good. I have gone from "cancer patient" to SURVIVOR! I hope to live a long life -- but I know that I'll have a lifetime of medical bills and will always need good, affordable health insurance. **So, will you stand with me, small-business owners like my boss, and Democrats to fight to protect affordable health care?**

Thank you,

Larry Berman
Milan, NY

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Sanctuary cities
body:
This bill is a huge step in keeping immigrant families together and standing up for the undocumented.
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Yesterday President Trump launched his first major attacks against immigrants. He announced that he would build a wall along the southern border with Mexico and strip federal grant money from sanctuary states and cities that protect undocumented immigrants.
**States and cities are going to be on the front lines of taking on the Trump administration's attempts to target immigrants and criminalize communities of color.**
In California, Senate leader Kevin de Leon has introduced SB 54, the California Values Act, to create safe spaces and expand protections for the undocumented. This legislation would ban the use of state and local resources for carrying out the work of federal immigration officials in deportation actions.
This bill is a _huge_ step in keeping immigrant families together and standing up for those who are being targeted by the Trump administration.
[**Add your name to say you support the California Values Act and to urge other states to pass similar legislation to protect immigrants from the harmful policies of the Trump administration.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/support-CA-SB-54?source=em170126-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/support-CA-SB-54?source=em170126-full")
By working at the state and local and level, we'll be able to resist Trump's plans to mass deport immigrants and tear families apart. Immigrants are our neighbors, friends, family members and co-workers. They are part of our communities and this country is theirs to call home.
This moment requires that we come together to protect those who are most vulnerable under Trump's administration. Thank you for joining with us in that effort.
In solidarity,
Erika Andiola
Our Revolution

I said that the transfer of power on January 20, 2017 wouldn’t just be from one political party to another, but from Washington, D.C. to YOU -- the American people. I mean it, Friend. Which is why I need you to step up and have a voice in your country again. Please take the First 100 Days Survey to ensure YOUR voice is included in our platform to Make America Great Again! The success of our movement -- and the future of our country -- depends upon YOU. Please make it your priority to take the First 100 Days Survey now. >> Thank you, Donald J. name: Greg Gianforte
subject: BREAKING: Special Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana
body:
I wanted you to be among the first to hear that when my good friend Congressman Ryan Zinke is confirmed as our Secretary of Interior and a Special Election is called, I will seek the nomination at the MTGOP Delegate Convention. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40145180:sYgiqllNG:m:1:1494336505:5BA8F5230B037F6B4B586629F6FDBE14:r)
---
Friend - I have some exciting news to share with you.

I wanted you to be among the first to hear that when my good friend Congressman Ryan Zinke is confirmed as our Secretary of Interior and a Special Election is called, **I will seek the nomination to fill our open House seat at the MTGOP Delegate Convention.**

In anticipation of the nominating convention taking place in the near future, I paid my filing fee to ensure I'm fully prepared to hit the ground running if - _or I should say WHEN_ - the vacancy is declared.

The direction of our country will be decided in the coming months and I decided to undertake this challenge because you deserve to have your voice heard and a champion who will always be on Montana's side.

**This race will be ground zero and the first official battle waged by the Democrats to stop the Republican/Trump agenda. I simply will not stand on the sidelines and allow that to happen. I'm ready to fight for our shared Montana values.**

**[Friend, that's why your support is needed from the beginning when a Special Election is called.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40145180:sYgiqllNG:m:1:1494336505:5BA8F5230B037F6B4B586629F6FDBE14:r)**

| [** Donate Today **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40145180:sYgiqllNG:m:1:1494336505:5BA8F5230B037F6B4B586629F6FDBE14:r)
---

Hillary Clinton, Barack Obama and their liberal allies will most certainly view this potential vacancy as their "phoenix rising from the ashes" moment. Expect millions upon millions of dollars to be poured into our state by the Democrats and their cadre of lobbyists, special interests and political action committees.

I feel the undeniable call to join the fight to drain the swamp. I will be on Montana's side - _NOT the side of the lobbyists, special interests, and elites._

It's time to give the power back to the people. Washington may not like this, but it's time America and Montana come first.

**[Bottom line: I will need your support to ensure I have the necessary resources to fight back and defeat my liberal Democrat opponent once the vacancy is declared.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40145180:sYgiqllNG:m:1:1494336505:5BA8F5230B037F6B4B586629F6FDBE14:r)**

I'll lead the charge to bring accountability to Washington:
* A balanced budget.
* Term limits.
* A ban to end the business of members of Congress from becoming lobbyists.

You can count on me to fight back against the D.C. elites who can't point to Montana on a map, yet have no problem imposing burdensome regulations that threaten to devastate our livelihoods.

**I'll stand strong for our Montana way of life:** Defending the Second Amendment. Standing for our Constitution. Protecting our coal and timber jobs. I'll stop the terrible trade deals that have hurt our economy and send jobs to places like China.

**I've spent my life in business creating Montana jobs.** I started a company here nearly two decades ago that employs five hundred Montanans. This success was the result of Montana work ethic and strong leadership. But you don't find this mentality back in Washington. It's just another reason why it's time to drain the swamp!

We have precious little time to build our campaign war chest. We only have a very short amount of time to build our grassroots army that will represent what is truly good for Montana and not for liberal special interest groups and the DC elite.

**[Friend, can I count on you to be one of the earliest supporters by making a campaign contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 or more today?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40145180:sYgiqllNG:m:1:1494336505:5BA8F5230B037F6B4B586629F6FDBE14:r)**

I'm humbled to have received the support of more than 100 voting central committee members, representing 139 total votes - **a majority of the potential state central committee votes at the upcoming nominating convention.**

My word and bond to you is that once elected, I will continue the legacy of representing strong Republican values for our great state. **[Please stand with me as I run to be on Montana's side and help President Trump bring true change to Washington.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40145180:sYgiqllNG:m:1:1494336505:5BA8F5230B037F6B4B586629F6FDBE14:r)**

I hope you're with me.

For Montana!

Greg Gianforte

P.S. Friend, I need your help. With the Democrats eyeing this race as the start of their redemption story, they will be firing up the Obama political machine and pouring millions upon millions of dollars into this race, once the vacancy is declared. [**Become one of the first supporters by following this secure link to make your contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or more today!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40145180:sYgiqllNG:m:1:1494336505:5BA8F5230B037F6B4B586629F6FDBE14:r)

[** Donate Today **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40145180:sYgiqllNG:m:1:1494336505:5BA8F5230B037F6B4B586629F6FDBE14:r)
---

I feel the undeniable call to join the fight to drain the swamp. I will be on Montana's side - NOT the side of the lobbyists, special interests, and elites. It's time to give the power back to the people. Washington may not like this, but it's time America and Montana come first. I'll lead the charge to bring accountability to Washington: A balanced budget. Term limits. A ban to end the business of members of Congress from becoming lobbyists. You can count on me to fight back against the D.C. elites who can't point to Montana on a map, yet have no problem imposing burdensome regulations that threaten to devastate our livelihoods. I'll stand strong for our Montana way of life: Defending the Second Amendment. Standing for our Constitution. Protecting our coal and timber jobs. I'll stop the terrible trade deals that have hurt our economy and send jobs to places like China. I've spent my life in business creating Montana jobs. I started a company here nearly two decades ago that employs five hundred Montanans. This success was the result of Montana work ethic and strong leadership. But you don't find this mentality back in Washington. It's just another reason why it's time to drain the swamp! We have precious little time to build our campaign war chest. We only have a very short amount of time to build our grassroots army that will represent what is truly good for Montana and not for liberal special interest groups and the DC elite. I'm humbled to have received the support of more than 100 voting central committee members, representing 139 total votes - a majority of the potential state central committee votes at the upcoming nominating convention. My word and bond to you is that once elected, I will continue the legacy of representing strong Republican values for our great state. ** I hope you're with me. For Montana! Greg Gianforte P.S. Friend, I need your help. With the Democrats eyeing this race as the start of their redemption story, they will be firing up the Obama political machine and pouring millions upon millions of dollars into this race, once the vacancy is declared. | Paid for by Greg for Montana This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 17, 2017. name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: Priorities 👏 out 👏 of 👏 whack 👏
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7194/24c69fd9/fa0e8dbc/18e1db89/3726155773/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE134N_digital_email_20170126_Hyde_n-all&source=WQEFE134N_digital_email_20170126_Hyde_n-all")
---

Peter,

We're not even a month into the new Congress and Republicans have already made it a priority to attack women's health care.

Before leaving for a retreat on Tuesday, House Republicans voted to make the Hyde Amendment, which bans federal funds from going toward abortion services, a permanent rule. THIS was their top priority in a three-day work week, and THIS was their priority after millions of women marched to declare that we refuse to have our rights rolled back.

Not a single one of our EMILY's List women in the House voted for it. We need to start working now to send them reinforcements for the years to come.

**[Donate $3 to help elect more pro-choice Democratic women who will fight to protect women's health care.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7194/24c69fd9/fa0e8dbc/18e1db8a/3726155773/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170126_email_Hyde?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+more+prochoice+De&utm_campaign=WQEFE134N_digital_email_20170126_Hyde_n-all&source=WQEFE134N_digital_email_20170126_Hyde_n-all")**

The Hyde Amendment vote isn't the only attack on women's health care we've seen this year.

Less than two weeks ago, Rep. Steve King (R-IA) introduced a bill that would effectively ban all abortions. This is the most extreme abortion ban we've ever seen in Congress, and it's modeled off similar bills Republicans have passed in the states. Even though courts have struck down those laws, Trump has emboldened Republicans to push them at a national level.

And in the midst of their threats to repeal the Affordable Care Act, Republicans are also planning to defund Planned Parenthood -- cutting off health care services to millions of women and men. This puts access to safe abortion, life-saving cancer screenings, STI testing, and much more at risk.

These attacks remind me of when congressional Republicans kept trying to defund Planned Parenthood in 2015. The difference? Now there's someone in the White House who will happily sign these measures into law.

**This is a big fight -- and one of the only ways we win is by replacing anti-choice Republicans with pro-choice Democratic women. Donate $3 now to help start the work of recruiting and training women who can win:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Start-Work](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7194/24c69fd9/fa0e8dbc/18e1db8b/3726155773/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170126_email_Hyde?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgStartWork&utm_campaign=WQEFE134N_digital_email_20170126_Hyde_n-all&source=WQEFE134N_digital_email_20170126_Hyde_n-all")**

Thank you,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List
